## Hardware-write checklist

Complete this section for changes involving manual boost, profiles, or another AWCC write.

- [ ] The write requires explicit confirmation
- [ ] Inputs are range-checked before calling WMI
- [ ] A return-to-firmware-control path is documented
- [ ] Raw firmware values are not presented as percentages or target RPM without evidence
- [ ] The change was tested on named hardware, or is clearly marked untested

## Documentation

- [ ] CLI help is updated when commands changed
- [ ] README or docs are updated when user behavior changed
- [ ] JSON fields remain compatible or the schema change is documented
- [ ] Changelog is updated for release-facing changes

## Privacy

- [ ] Logs and screenshots contain no computer names, usernames, paths, service tags, serial numbers, or secrets
